docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER TILLEY, VIRGIL MAURICE HEARING SET FOR JUN-26-2014 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 514
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PETITIONER TILLEY, VIRGIL MAURICE

UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF AUG-28-2014 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME CONTINUED TO OCT-30-2014 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 514. PETITIONER PRESENT ON HIS OWN BEHALF. PETITIONER IS REQUIRED TO INFORM HIS PROBATION OFFICER OF HIS REQUEST TO CHANGE HIS NAME. A LETTER WITH OFFICAL LETTER HEAD AND SIGNED IN BLUE INK BY THE PROBATION OFFICER STATING THAT SHE IS AWARE OF THE PROPOSED NAME CHANGE AND HER OPINION OF THE PROPOSED NAME CHANGE MUST BE FILED WITH THE COURT AND A COURTSEY COPY SUBMITTED 10 DAYS PRIOR TO THE HEARING DATE. (514)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PETITIONER TILLEY, VIRGIL MAURICE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF JUN-26-2014 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME CONTINUED TO AUG-28-2014 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 514. PETITIONER VIRGIL MAURICE TILLEY APPEARING ON HIS OWN BEHALF. NO PROOF OF PUBLICATION ON FILE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: MITCH LYON , CSR#6840. (514)
